code_under_test.description: closed-loop correction: consensus snap on init, per-candidate limited corrections (0.20 m / 2 deg), reacquisition on LOST

live_trial.seed_snap_and_reacquisition: verified live: consensus snap after operator seed, automatic VERIFYING reacquisition after LOST

known_issue.symptom: sawtooth pose jumps up to 1.1 m near end of route
known_issue.cause: sparse map coverage causes NOT_CONVERGED streaks; odometry drift accumulates and reacquisition snaps it back; magnitude scales with speed (same ~1 m/s speed was clean in well-mapped segments)
recommended_actions: remap and merge the sparse segment
optional: rate-limit reacquisition corrections (slew) to smooth snaps
operational: reduce speed in that segment until remapped

operational_notes.fast_lio_divergence: one FAST-LIO divergence observed under heavy CPU load (4K VNC polling); restart recovered; keep VNC at 1080p
operational_notes.seed_workflow: operator seed disables auto correction; auto re-enable helper used during trial
